description.content: Returns all registered workflow specifications.

item.name: Create or update a workflow specification

request.name: Create or update a workflow specification

description.content: Creates or updates a workflow specification.
Returns a specific workflow specification by name.
Deletes a workflow specification.
Starts a new workflow run based on a workflow specification.
Returns details of a specific workflow run.
Deletes a workflow run and its data.
Stops a running workflow.
Resumes a halted workflow run.
Search for workflow runs based on criteria.
Returns all registered task definitions.

item.name: Create or update a task definition

request.name: Create or update a task definition

description.content: Creates or updates a task definition.
Returns a specific task definition.
Deletes a task definition.
Returns all registered external event definitions.
Creates a new external event definition.
Returns a specific external event definition.
Posts an external event to a specific workflow run.
Returns details of a specific user task run.
Assigns a user task to a user or group.
Completes a user task with results.
Returns details of a specific node run within a workflow.

The LittleHorse REST API provides HTTP endpoints for managing workflow specifications (WfSpec), workflow runs (WfRun), task definitions (TaskDef), external event definitions, user tasks, and other resources in the LittleHorse workflow engine.
